mapper.insert: INSERT INTO AI_RISK_RESULT ( ARR_NO, ARR_BIZ_TYPE_CD, ARR_REF_NO, ARR_SCORE, ARR_GRADE_CD, ARR_RESULT_CN, ARR_DETAIL_CN, ARR_STATUS_CD, ARR_REGIST_DT, ARR_OFFICER_ID ) VALUES ( #{arrNo}, #{arrBizTypeCd}, #{arrRefNo}, #{arrScore}, #{arrGradeCd}, #{arrResultCn}, #{arrDetailCn}, #{arrStatusCd}, SYSDATE, #{arrOfficerId} )
mapper.select: SELECT ARR_NO AS arrNo, ARR_BIZ_TYPE_CD AS arrBizTypeCd, ARR_REF_NO AS arrRefNo, ARR_SCORE AS arrScore, ARR_GRADE_CD AS arrGradeCd, ARR_RESULT_CN AS arrResultCn, ARR_DETAIL_CN AS arrDetailCn, ARR_STATUS_CD AS arrStatusCd, ARR_REGIST_DT AS arrRegistDt, ARR_UPDT_DT AS arrUpdtDt, ARR_OFFICER_ID AS arrOfficerId FROM AI_RISK_RESULT WHERE ARR_BIZ_TYPE_CD = #{arrBizTypeCd} AND ARR_REF_NO = #{arrRefNo} ORDER BY ARR_REGIST_DT DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
mapper.update: UPDATE AI_RISK_RESULT SET ARR_SCORE = #{arrScore}, ARR_GRADE_CD = #{arrGradeCd}, ARR_RESULT_CN = #{arrResultCn}, ARR_DETAIL_CN = #{arrDetailCn}, ARR_STATUS_CD = #{arrStatusCd}, ARR_UPDT_DT = SYSDATE, ARR_OFFICER_ID = #{arrOfficerId} WHERE ARR_NO = #{arrNo}
